title: Tapscript
description: Tapscript is the script version used for Taproot script-path spends. It keeps the basic Script model but changes signature rules, replaces CHECKMULTISIG with CHECKSIGADD, and adds upgrade hooks such as OP_SUCCESSx.

resources.title: BIP 342: Validation of Taproot Scripts
resources.notes: Primary specification for Taproot script-path execution rules, opcode changes, and resource limits.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Tapscript
resources.notes: Canonical terminology and ecosystem references for Tapscript-related implementation work.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop context for how Taproot keys, TapTrees, and Tapscript fit together.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Practical grounding for Script execution, witness semantics, and spending-condition design.
